session.user:
Run these commands in sequence and report results: 1. `uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/commands/objective/check_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_objective_node.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/plan_header.py tests/shared/github/test_plan_header_extraction.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_update_objective_node.py tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py` 2. `uv run ruff format --check src/erk/cli/commands/objective/check_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_objective_node.py packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/plan_header.py tests/shared/github/test_plan_header_extraction.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_update_objective_node.py tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py` 3. `uv run pytest tests/shared/github/test_plan_header_extraction.py tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_update_objective_node.py tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_check_cmd.py -v --tb=short`
Do NOT fix any errors - just report what you find.
session.assistant: I'll execute these commands in sequence and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff check on target files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ruff format check on target files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on test files with verbose output
